introduction: You pull out the seven-pointed star key you found at the refugee camp.
It slides into the lock perfectly. As you turn it, you hear the deep grinding of ancient mechanisms coming to life. Gears turn, bolts slide, and with a heavy THUNK, the door unseals.
Beyond lies darkness and the faint hum of arcane energy. The portal chamber below is active.
This is it. Whatever the cult has been planning, it ends here.
